message:
Fix remaining TS errors in tsconfig.json and vite.config.ts (#4427)

- tsconfig.json: Add ignoreDeprecations for baseUrl warning
- vite.config.ts: Type html parameter in transformIndexHtml
- vite.config.ts: Use algorithms array instead of deprecated algorithm
  string for vite-plugin-compression2

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
